positive: A whimsical, highly stylized forest scene featuring glowing fireflies illuminating giant, bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate fern patterns. The composition is centrally arranged, focusing on a winding root system and a whimsical woodland creature (like an fox or rabbit, but stylized and non-specific) nestled among the flora. Style should be a combination of Art Nouveau elegance and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print detailing. Use deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with brilliant, ethereal golden light sources emanating from the glowing elements. The overall aesthetic must be clean, high-contrast, and suitable for printing on fabric. Perfect silhouettes and clear separation between subjects and background.
negative: blur, amateur, grainy, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, low detail, graffiti, realism, photo, low contrast, blurry background
